name: Louisiana Bbq'd Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Juice and rind of 1 Lemon
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except shrimp in a large bowl.
2. Cook, stirring frequently for 35-50 minutes until thickened.
3. Allow the sauce to cool completely.
4. Refrigerate the sauce for up to one week to allow flavors to blend.
5. Marinate shrimp in the sauce for at least 1 hour.
6. Arrange shrimp on skewers.
7. Grill, basting every minute with leftover sauce until shrimp are cooked through and the flesh turns from pink to white, about 5 minutes. Do not overcook; overcooked shrimp become tough and chewy.
